untranslatable_reason: Pattern recognition for 'bottom pattern' reversal cannot be expressed using only available price and technical indicators. The signal requires visual/structural pattern identification (V-shaped or U-shaped bottom formation) which is not available in the indicator set. Market regime detection (BULL_MARKET vs BEAR_MARKET) is not in ALLOWED_REGIMES list.
translation_notes: Attempted entry/exit using price crossover of SMA_20 as proxy for trend reversal detection. However, the core signal depends on identifying specific chart patterns that require custom pattern recognition logic outside the scope of standard technical indicators. Exit conditions marked as AUTHOR_SILENT were mapped to reversal of entry condition. Hold period set to 160 days (bull market upper bound from parameters).
